title: Handheld Bidet Sprayer Kits for UK Toilet Douche_ Shattaf Bidets with Bidet Hose, Spray Holder and T-Adapter_ Glossy Silver
features: Effortless Hygiene_ Experience superior cleanliness with our handheld bidet sprayer. Its precise water flow ensures a gentle yet thorough cleanse, ideal for personal hygiene and those with sensitive skin.

Multi-Purpose Use_ Versatile in function, this bidet sprayer is perfect not only for personal hygiene but also for cleaning cloth diapers, pet bathing, and household chores like toilet and floor cleaning.
Ergonomic Design_ Enjoy easy operation with the ergonomic handle and a smooth trigger that requires minimal pressure, providing comfortable use every time.
Easy Installation_ This shattaf set comes with a 47-inch stainless steel hose and a T-valve for hassle-free setup. Fits standard 1/2-inch plumbing connections.
Durable & Stylish Design_ Made from high-quality materials with a polished chrome finish, this sprayer is built to resist corrosion, scratches, and tarnishing, ensuring long-lasting performance.
description: Product Description SPECIFICATIONS Sprayer Material: Engineering Plastic (ABS) Bracket Material: Engineering Plastic (ABS) Bidet Hose: Stainless Steel, 47-Inch/1.2-M T-adapter: Brass, G 1/2" Thread Connector COMPATIBILITY: LEFT-SIDE WATER INLET ONLY Finish: Chrome Plated, Resistance to Corrosion Flow Rate: Rated at 2.5 GPM Package: 1 x T-adapter, 1 x Spray Head, 1 x 120cm Bidet Hose, 1 x Bracket, 2 x Screws and Anchors, 1 x User Manual Troubleshooting Tips for Leaks Hose or T-valve Leaks 1. Check rubber washers are in place and connections hand-tightened. 2. Avoid overtightening metal parts. Shut-Off Valve Leaks 1. Open and close a few times to reseat the seal. 2. Inspect the O-ring for wear or misalignment. Sprayer Head Dripping 1. Residual water after use is normal. 2. Ensure trigger is fully released. High Water Pressure 1. Adjust shut-off valve to lower pressure. 2. Excess pressure may cause leaks.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Handheld Sprayer, Multi-Purpose Use, Easy Installation, Ergonomic Design, Adjustable Water Pressure
